content_of_post_to_comment:
all my life i have atleast been on youtube atleast once a week and i have recently realised that my whole personality is youtube i was a youtube kid now im an adult who still watches youtube. now that im trying to quit im a bit stumped on these questions

do i also stop gaming?
do i stop using tiktok/reels?
comment: I don't think quitting YouTube automatically means cutting out every screen activity. The bigger question might be whether you're choosing these things or just reaching for them whenever there's a quiet moment. Gaming can be a hobby, but endless feeds are designed to keep you there. Maybe try removing the stuff that feels compulsive first and see what changes.
